name: @php-workx/skill-codereview
description: Local AI code review skill for Claude Code and Codex. Explorer-judge architecture with deterministic scans, spec verification, and chunked review for large diffs.

scripts.validate: bash -n skills/codereview/scripts/validate_output.sh && bash -n skills/codereview/scripts/run-scans.sh && bash -n skills/codereview/scripts/complexity.sh && python3 -c "import ast; [ast.parse(open(f).read()) for f in ['skills/codereview/scripts/enrich-findings.py','skills/codereview/scripts/discover-project.py']]" && bash -n scripts/install-codereview-skill.sh && bash -n scripts/ci-local-release.sh
